  if (!length) length = Infinity;

    const opLength = Op.length(nextOp);
    if (length >= opLength - offset) {
      length = opLength - offset;
      this.index++;
      this.offset = 0;
    } else {
      this.offset += length;
    }
    if (typeof nextOp.delete === 'number') {

    } else {

      }
      return retOp;
    }
  } else {
    return { retain: Infinity };
  }
}
